positive: A symmetrical, intricate mandala design featuring stylized glowing bioluminescent flora and celestial constellations. The central motif should depict intertwined flowering vines that transition seamlessly into deep space nebulae and crescent moons. Use a highly contrasted color palette of midnight indigo, deep sapphire, electric teal, and glowing metallic gold accents. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and clean, geometric vector art, emphasizing strong silhouettes and crystal-like crystalline details. The composition must be centered, isolated on a solid background, and suitable for direct transfer onto fabric, maximizing visual impact and clean edges.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, low contrast, writing, artifacts, poor composition, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy
